A '''battle''' was fought on a [[Unidentified red-skied planet|planet]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], resulting in the natives' enslavement by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==The battle==
Following a fierce battle between the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] defense forces and an invading CIS army, an unnamed city was badly-damaged and still smoking from fires caused by the battle. [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|Separatist destroyers]], as well as [[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|droid tri-fighters]] could be seen overhead, blockading the planet against [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] intervention. The resident [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] species on the planet were captured and held under guard by [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]].

==Appearances==
*{{CW|22}} {{1st}}
